name: Beef Casserole with Edam
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, diced into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 green bell pepper, diced into 1/2-inch pieces
1/2 cup Black olives, pitted and halved
7 oz Edam cheese, sliced into 1/4-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook onion in butter over moderate heat until golden.
2. Add steak, tomatoes, and bell peppers to the skillet. Cook, stirring, over medium-high heat until veggies are softened.
3. Add egg, raisins, olives, gherkins, and mushrooms. Stir for 1 minute.
4. Pour in brandy (ignite gently), then stir in flour. Cook for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in beef broth, chili paste, chili sauce, ketchup, Tabasco, salt, and pepper to taste. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
6. Arrange cheese slices on the sides of a shallow 2-quart casserole dish.
7. Pour the beef mixture into the casserole and cover with remaining Edam cheese.
8. Add water to reach about 1 inch up the sides of the casserole, then cover with foil.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 15 minutes.
10. Serve with sauteed bananas.
